title: HKEYS
description: Returns all fields in a hash.
complexity: O(N) where N is the size of the hash.

sections.title: Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility

content:
Returns all field names in the hash stored at `key`. ## Examples HSET myhash field1 "Hello" HSET myhash field2 "World" HKEYS myhash ## Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility | Redis
Software | Redis
Cloud | Notes | |:----------------------|:-----------------|:------| | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | | ## Return information **RESP2:** [Array reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#arrays): a list of fields in the hash, or an empty list when the key does not exist **RESP3:** [Array reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#arrays): a list of fields in the hash, or an empty list when the key does not exist.
intro: Returns all field names in the hash stored at `key`.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: Returns all field names in the hash stored at `key`.

sections.title: Examples
sections.content:
HSET myhash field1 "Hello"
HSET myhash field2 "World"
HKEYS myhash

sections.title: Return information
sections.content:
**RESP2:**

[Array reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#arrays): a list of fields in the hash, or an empty list when the key does not exist

**RESP3:**

[Array reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#arrays): a list of fields in the hash, or an empty list when the key does not exist.
